column2: Upper Boundary: Depth to first data point (m)
column3: Lower Boundary: Depth to bottom data point (m)
column4: Observed Depths (multiple allowed, one number per row)
column5: Kt is the sat thermal conductivity of sediment, W/m/C (needed)
column6: Cwater is the volumetric heat capacity of water, J/m3/C (constant unless salt water)
column7: phi is the porosity of sediment, unitless (only if Csat not defined)
column8: Csat is the volumetric heat capacity of saturated sediment, J/m3/C
column9: Process variance (vq_mday2) (write None, if prefer to use automated calculation)
